headline: Campbell’s (CPB) Rallies 5% Ahead of Dividends
summary: The Campbell’s Company’s (NASDAQ:CPB) is one of the 10 Stocks Investors Are Tracking Now. Campbell’s rallied for a second day on Friday, jumping 4.96 percent to finish at $21.99 apiece, as investors gobbled up shares ahead of the cutoff date for its next dividends. According to the company, it would pay dividends amounting to $0.39 […]
